use_cases: Create animated meteor/star effects for hero sections and landing pages
Add decorative cosmic visual effects to dark-themed backgrounds
Enhance marketing and product showcase sections with dynamic animations
Provide ambient visual interest for SaaS landing pages
Add engaging visual effects to page transitions or overlays
ai_summary: A decorative React component that renders animated meteor/streak effects on a dark background. The component generates randomly positioned meteor elements with CSS animations, gradients, and varying animation durations. It's designed as a background effect for hero sections, landing pages, and marketing sections, commonly used in SaaS and portfolio sites to create visual interest with cosmic-themed animations.
